items.name: chat-message
items.title: Chat Message

items.name: prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input
items.description: Auto-resizing composer with attachment, voice, model picker, and send controls.

items.name: loader
items.title: Loader
items.description: Multi-variant loading indicators including spinners, dots, waves, and text animations.

items.name: typing-indicator
items.title: Typing Indicator
items.description: Animated indicator that shows when the assistant is thinking.

items.name: model-selector
items.title: Model Selector
items.description: Dropdown for switching between AI models, with provider badges and context sizes.

items.name: model-card
items.title: Model Card
items.description: Spec card for an AI model with capabilities, context, pricing, and a select action.

items.name: prompt-suggestions
items.title: Prompt Suggestions
items.description: A grid of suggested starter prompts to kick off a conversation.

items.name: reasoning-panel
items.title: Reasoning Panel
items.description: Collapsible chain-of-thought panel with a live duration timer.

items.name: message-actions
items.title: Message Actions
items.description: Copy, regenerate, and feedback toolbar that sits under an assistant reply.

items.name: citation-list
items.title: Citation List
items.description: Numbered source citations with favicons, titles, and snippets for RAG answers.

items.name: media-player
items.title: Media Player
items.description: Compact audio/video transport with scrubber, time, and volume controls.

items.name: audio-waveform
items.title: Audio Waveform
items.description: Waveform player with animated bars and seek-on-click.

items.name: image-gallery
items.title: Image Gallery
items.description: Responsive masonry gallery with hover overlays and a selectable lead image.

items.name: video-card
items.title: Video Card
items.description: Thumbnail card with duration pill, channel avatar, and view metadata.

items.name: image-generation-card
items.title: Image Generation Card
items.description: Generated-image result card with the prompt, variations, and quick actions.

items.name: file-dropzone
items.title: File Dropzone
items.description: Drag-and-drop upload surface with per-file progress and status.

items.name: now-playing
items.title: Now Playing
items.description: Music widget with album art, marquee title, scrubber, and transport controls.

items.name: image-compare
items.title: Image Compare
items.description: Before/after slider for comparing two images with a draggable handle.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Code surface with a filename tab, language badge, line numbers, and copy button.

items.name: terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: Faux terminal that types out a sequence of commands and their output.

items.name: diff-view
items.title: Diff View
items.description: Unified diff with added/removed lines, gutter markers, and a stat summary.

items.name: file-tree
items.title: File Tree
items.description: Collapsible file explorer with folder/file icons and an active item.

items.name: command-menu
items.title: Command Menu
items.description: Command palette with grouped, keyboard-navigable actions.

items.name: pull-request-card
items.title: Pull Request Card
items.description: Pull-request summary with status, reviewers, checks, and additions/deletions.

items.name: package-install
items.title: Package Install
items.description: Tabbed install command for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun with one-click copy.

items.name: snippet-card
items.title: Snippet Card

items.name: conversation
items.title: Conversation

items.name: attachments
items.title: Attachments

items.name: chain-of-thought
items.title: Chain of Thought

items.name: tool
items.title: Tool
items.description: Tool-call card with status, JSON parameters, and the returned result.

items.name: task
items.title: Task
items.description: Collapsible agent task showing the files and actions it touched.

items.name: plan
items.title: Plan
items.description: Agent task plan with done, active, and todo steps and a progress count.

items.name: sources
items.title: Sources
items.description: Collapsible list of the web sources cited in a RAG answer.

items.name: inline-citation
items.title: Inline Citation
items.description: Inline numbered citation markers that reveal the source on hover.

items.name: context
items.title: Context
items.description: Hover-card breakdown of model context usage with token and cost details.

items.name: confirmation
items.title: Confirmation

items.name: checkpoint
items.title: Checkpoint
items.description: A labeled restore-point divider for rewinding a conversation.

items.name: queue
items.title: Queue
items.description: Pending prompt queue with positions and one-click removal.

items.name: shimmer
items.title: Shimmer
items.description: Animated shimmer for loading text and skeleton lines.

items.name: open-in-chat
items.title: Open in Chat

items.name: image
items.title: Image

items.name: web-preview

items.name: login-form

items.name: otp-form

items.description: Verification card with a grouped six-digit one-time-code input and resend link.

items.name: orb
items.title: Orb
items.description: AIEllie's signature iridescent sphere — a pure-CSS gradient orb with an optional float.

items.title: Logo
items.description: The AIEllie brand lockup — the Ellie orb mark beside the wordmark and version.

items.name: artifact

items.name: test-results

items.name: package-info

items.description: Voice-note player with a waveform scrubber, speed control, and download.

items.name: aspect-ratio

items.description: Command palette with AI actions, shortcuts, and recent chats grouped in a searchable menu.
